title: Roofing and Roof Drainage
reference: UFGS-derived logic adapted for draft specification use, subject to Philippine review.

clauses.scope: This work covers roofing panels, flashings, gutters, downspouts, sealants, fasteners, and accessories required for a complete roof system.
materials: Use roofing panels and accessories of approved profile, thickness, and finish.
Provide compatible sealants, fasteners, and closures recommended for the roofing system.
execution: Verify supports, line, level, and roof slope before installation.
Install roofing in accordance with approved layout and manufacturer recommendations.
Complete all laps, sealant application, flashings, and penetrations to achieve a watertight assembly.
testing: Inspect alignment, fastener installation, laps, and visible watertightness-related details.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted area, length, or corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include roofing materials, drainage accessories, fasteners, sealants, labor, and incidentals.

title: Plumbing and Sanitary Piping
reference: UFGS-derived logic adapted for draft specification use, subject to Philippine review and National Plumbing Code compliance.

clauses.scope: This work covers supply and installation of water supply, sanitary, vent, and drain piping systems complete with fittings, supports, and testing.
materials: Use pipe materials, fittings, and joining compounds suitable for the system service and pressure class.
Provide valves, cleanouts, supports, sleeves, and accessories as indicated.
execution: Install piping true to line and grade and provide proper supports.
Coordinate sleeves, penetrations, and concealed routing with structural and architectural work.
Test piping systems before concealment and turnover.
testing: Perform hydrostatic, pressure, or leak tests as applicable to the piping system.
Inspect pipe slopes, supports, fittings, and visible workmanship.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted length, set, or corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include pipes, fittings, valves, supports, testing, labor, tools, and incidentals.

title: Electrical Works
reference: UFGS-derived logic adapted for draft specification use, subject to Philippine review and PEC compliance.

clauses.scope: This work covers raceways, conductors, boxes, devices, fixtures, panels, supports, identification, and testing for complete electrical systems.
materials: Use wires, cables, raceways, fittings, boxes, and equipment of the specified rating and approved type.
Provide identification labels and supports required for a complete installation.
execution: Install raceways neatly and coordinate routing with other trades.
Pull conductors after raceways are complete, clean, and protected.
Complete circuiting, labeling, and equipment termination in an orderly manner.
testing: Perform continuity, insulation resistance, and functional testing before energization.
Verify grounding, labeling, and visible compliance with approved plans.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted length, set, lot, or corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include materials, installation, supports, testing, labor, tools, and incidentals.

title: Ceiling and Partition Systems
reference: UFGS-derived logic adapted for draft specification use, subject to Philippine review.

clauses.scope: This work covers suspended ceiling systems, gypsum board assemblies, partitions, framing, accessories, and finishing required by the contract documents.
materials: Use framing members, boards, fasteners, joint compounds, and accessories suitable for the indicated assembly.
Provide corrosion-protected members where required by the environment or project conditions.
execution: Lay out framing accurately and coordinate with MEP penetrations and supports.
Install boards and accessories to achieve alignment, flatness, and a properly finished surface.
Complete joints, corners, and finishing in accordance with the approved finish level.
testing: Inspect framing alignment, board installation, fastener treatment, and visible finish quality.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted area, length, or corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include framing, boards, accessories, finishing materials, labor, tools, and incidentals.
